title: Sonbhadra District Court Special Judicial Magistrate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Sonbhadra District Court Recruitment 2026: Sonbhadra District Court has released the official notification for Special Judicial Magistrate posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sonbhadra District Court Special Judicial Magistrate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://districts.ecourts.gov.in/sonbhadra.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
